recommendations.title: Problem Child 2
recommendations.overview: Junior and his father, Ben, move from Cold River to Mortville. Junior becomes threatened by Ben's desire to date again and find a new mother for Junior, and sabotages each of his dates.

recommendations.title: Snow Dogs
recommendations.overview: When a Miami dentist inherits a team of sled dogs, he's got to learn the trade or lose his pack to a crusty mountain man.

recommendations.title: The Spy Next Door

recommendations.title: Jingle All the Way

recommendations.title: Suzanne
recommendations.overview: The story of a family and a love affair told through the journey of a young woman called Suzanne.

recommendations.title: Are We Done Yet?
recommendations.overview: Newlyweds Nick and Suzanne decide to move to the suburbs to provide a better life for their two kids. But their idea of a dream home is disturbed by a contractor with a bizarre approach to business.

recommendations.title: Beethoven
recommendations.overview: The Newton family live in their comfortable home, but there seems to something missing. This "hole" is filled by a small puppy, who walks into their home and their lives. Beethoven, as he is named, grows into a giant of a dog... a St Bernard. Doctor
